Notice Of Motion And Omtion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests Fro Production Of Documents, Requests For Admission And Request For Statement Of Damages; Request For Related Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Laura S. Flynn, Esq. of Low Ball & Lynch, Tel. 415.981.6630, for defendant and moving party;
Christopher R. Bolding, Esq. of Hooshmand Law Group, Tel. 415.318.5709, for plaintiff.

RULING: The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, DEFENDANT JOHN DEMATTEI's Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Requests for Production Of Documents, Requests For Admission And Request For Statement Of Damages; Request For Related Sanctions is granted in part and denied in part. All requests for sanctions are denied. Order signed. (See scanned order for details of the ruling.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.
